The '''Kath subjugation''' was the conquest of the [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]]-[[Waterworld/Legends|covered]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Kath II]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It used a number of the then-new [[Aquadon CAVa 400]] [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] attack vehicles to make underwater attacks against the forces of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], who had taken up positions within the [[Karm Trenches]].<ref name="AIR" /> The subjugation led to extensive civilian casualties.<ref name="TEA" />
